claim: a local direct-TFT page1 file-browser probe gets farther than the official/authoring path: the object is not fully healthy, but it is no longer a pure 'nothing saved' state

conclusions.narrowing: the local direct-TFT route can materialize a partially alive page1 file-browser object: txt is a readable empty string, while dir/filter still fail as invalid_reference. this is narrower than the pure authoring/save gap and points to remaining page-local field layout or user-slot binding problems for A-type objects on page1.
